medialive.channel.inputchannellevel.CfnA:
The setting to remix the audio.

The parent of this entity is AudioChannelMappings.

medialive.channel.inputchannellevel.Gain.Description: The remixing value. Units are in dB, and acceptable values are within the range from -60 (mute) to 6 dB.

medialive.channel.inputchannellevel.Inpu.Description: The index of the input channel that is used as a source.
